identity.name: Vitality
identity.mission: Empowering independence through accessible, reliable medication management.
identity.archetype: The Caregiver (Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy + High Contrast)

typography.accessibility_rules: All text must meet WCAG AAA contrast ratio. No text smaller than 14px allowed.

usage.background: Use Stone-100 (#F5F5F4) as the main app background to reduce glare.
usage.text: Use Stone-900 (#1C1917) for all primary text. Never use pure black on white.
usage.action: Use Indigo-600 (#4F46E5) for primary buttons and links.

buttons.default: h-12 px-6 rounded-lg font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.large: h-16 px-8 text-xl rounded-xl font-bold shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.icon: h-12 w-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-white border border-border shadow-sm hover:bg-accent

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.default: h-12 px-4 rounded-lg border-2 border-input bg-white focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all text-lg

accessibility.aria_labels: All interactive elements MUST have aria-label if text is not descriptive enough.
accessibility.text_scaling: Ensure layout handles 200% text zoom without breaking.

specific_instructions.voice_integration: Use browser 'speechSynthesis' API for reading reminders. Add a prominent 'Read Aloud' button.
specific_instructions.notifications: Simulate email notifications for missed doses (console log or toast).
specific_instructions.dates: Use 'date-fns' for all date manipulation. Show relative time (e.g., 'In 2 hours').
specific_instructions.theme_mode: Force Light Mode by default for elderly visibility, but allow toggle. The defined palette is for Light Mode. For Dark Mode, inverse background to #1C1917 and text to #F5F5F4.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do NOT use generic 'center-everything' layouts. Use grids and asymmetry for interest.
Use 2-3x more padding than standard. Minimum p-6 for cards.
Interactive elements must have clear hover/active states.
Components must be resilient to missing data (use fallbacks).
Never use pure black (#000000). Use #1C1917 or #0A0A0A.
